> Updated: 2026-04-09

(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [EssentialAI: Rnj 1 Instruct](https://llmcosts.dev/models/rnj-1-instruct) | Essentialai | $0.15 | $0.15 | $None | 32,768 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
